articles.title: Odell Beckham Jr. reunion highlights trio of Giants signings
articles.description: NEW YORK — OBJ is back in blue. The Giants signed veteran wide receivers Odell Beckham Jr. and JuJu Smith-Schuster and veteran punt returner Braxton Berrios after a Monday morning workout. Beckham, 33, and Smith-Schuster, 29, add depth to an underwhelming receiving corps that has no timetable on the return of top playmaker Malik Nabers as he recovers from a torn right ACL and meniscus. ...

articles.title: 'Backrooms' viral appeal pushes it to $81M US box office debut
articles.description: A24's latest horror film "Backrooms" grossed over $81 million at the domestic box office — making nearly $120 million worldwide — on just a budget of $10 million. "Backrooms" is just the latest example of low-budget films, alongside "Obsession" (grossing $148 million worldwide on a budget of less than $1 million), outperforming the blockbuster debuts from bigger studios. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman, Yahoo Finance Breaking News Reporter Jake Conley, and Barron's Investor Circle Newsletter editor Josh Schafer discuss this trend in films and methods in viral content creation.

articles.title: 😳Alarm in France over Saliba, he could be out for weeks
articles.description: According to reports from France, the Arsenal centre-back is dealing with an injury that may have worsened and could put his participation in the World Cup at risk. Maximum caution and concern over William Saliba in France, as reports from the country suggest the player’s injury worsened last Saturday after the Champions League final, and there is now a risk that he may miss the World Cup. If this issue is confirmed, it would be a very hard blow for Deschamps, as France make their World Cup debut on June 16 against Senegal. All eyes are on Saliba.
